<!--
感谢提交 PR！请填写下方信息以便审核。
Thanks for the PR! Please fill in the sections below to help review.
-->

## 变更内容 / What Changed

<!-- 一句话概括本次 PR 做了什么。One sentence summary. -->

## 变更原因 / Why

<!-- 解决什么问题？关联 Issue #__？ -->
<!-- What problem does it solve? Closes #__? -->

## 实现要点 / Implementation Notes

<!-- 关键设计决策、取舍、潜在影响。 -->
<!-- Key design decisions, trade-offs, potential impact. -->

## 验证方式 / How to Verify

<!-- 列出你做的本地验证步骤；CI 跑了哪些；手测了哪些路径。 -->
<!-- Local verification, CI status, manual test paths. -->

- [ ] `ruff check .` 通过 / passes
- [ ] `pytest` 全绿 / all green
- [ ] 前端 `npm run build` 通过（若涉及）/ frontend build passes (if applicable)
- [ ] 数据库迁移已生成（若涉及）/ Alembic migration generated (if applicable)
- [ ] 文档已更新（若涉及）/ Documentation updated (if applicable)

## 截图 / Screenshots

<!-- UI 变更请贴前后对比图。 -->
<!-- For UI changes, attach before/after screenshots. -->

## 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 我已阅读 [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) / I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] 我已遵守 [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) / I follow CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md
- [ ] 我已为本次变更补充测试（或说明无需测试的原因）/ Tests added (or explained why not needed)
- [ ] Commit message 遵循 Conventional Commits / commits follow Conventional Commits
